description_long: This chaise features a minimalist, modern design with a rectangular seat and a tall, straight backrest. The structure appears to be constructed from a solid, uniform material with a smooth, matte finish, likely metal or wood. The seat is flat and broad, providing ample sitting space, while the backrest is slightly thicker and extends vertically with a subtle stepped edge detail at the top. The legs are straight and sturdy, positioned at the corners for stability, and lack any decorative elements. There are no visible armrests, giving the chaise a clean and open profile. The overall color is a consistent medium gray, and the surface texture is smooth with a faint wood grain or brushed metal appearance.
description: A modern, gray chaise with a flat seat, tall straight backrest, and simple straight legs, all in a smooth matte finish. The design is minimalist with no armrests or decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat seat, tall backrest with stepped edge, and straight front and back legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full width of the backrest and the two rear legs, with no visible seat details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the seat, backrest, and straight legs from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the flat seat surface, the front edge, and the full height of the backrest behind it.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and rectangular with a subtle stepped edge detail at the top, giving it a slightly layered appearance. It is solid and unadorned, with no visible curvature or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, rectangular, and extend vertically from each corner, constructed from the same material as the rest of the chaise. They are simple and lack any decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The surface is solid gray with a faint linear texture, possibly resembling brushed metal or subtle wood grain, but no visible upholstery pattern or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no separate or loose cushions; the seat and backrest are integrated into the main structure, forming a single, continuous surface.
